{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321144737DE086AC0182B17D7701C"}"},"total":47953},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7302330514118722339","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这个作者科班出身吗？文字太老道了。语言清爽，画面绚丽。而且，最关键的是故事还好看。在番茄到处溜达多年，这个惊艳了，必须排第一。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1700207894,"group_id":"7261739716398025762","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5e5St/NjUk0GFp4AU+CThsBhRyCJB9zdTETb7FvqQ6Z","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616050&x-signature=DrAQG0h3j%2BuZjDoa%2FpIJp7vPNFs%3D","user_id":"1415809140798766","user_name":"泱州的武翩绝"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1415809140798766","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1730567173,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7261739716398025762","book_info":{"abstract":"排雷：屎尿屁很多，吃饭不要看。
版本一：
江棉棉穿越了。
老爹阴险狡诈书生面，
老娘心狠手辣菩萨脸，
大哥面憨心奸，
二姐自私嘴贱。
他们生来就注定是反派，为了衬托主角的正义善良伟大，他们努力做各种坏事，一身泥泞，跌入深渊，不得好死。
江棉棉——手握灵泉，又脆又怂，只能让家人活的久亿点。
……
版本二：
前世棉棉一家早早死绝。
这一辈子。
和最红的公公结干亲。
和反贼头子拜把子。
不孝不悌。
不忠不义。
没有风骨。
但是他们都活着，一家人整整齐齐。
……
版本三
读者总结：爹是美杜莎，娘是北极熊，哥哥是恶狼，姐是黄鼠狼，女主是大熊猫，力拔山兮气盖世，只卖萌。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a3a5e8a91c70da1ffa16dec5057115ed","author":"宋象白","author_id":"","book_id":"7261739716398025762","book_name":"穿越之我全家都有八百个心眼子","book_short_name":"十恶不慑","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#b09860","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"25.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":253,"name":"古言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=253&name=古言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7261739982920876596","read_count":"255337","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"832783"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.6","serial_count":"370","tags":"古言脑洞,古代言情,穿越,反派","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/05d88df11a6c590cec470c96927c5e6d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779259657&x-signature=qfAEFaOwq5e0E68vGsgWzbtoplM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1319013798913150","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.415633e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321144737DE086AC0182B17D7701C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":842,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":7664,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10079,"reply_count":17,"show_pv":605283},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7262044816874406716","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好喜欢白白的简介，干脆利落又朗朗上口，哪有天生的反派，都是为了活着立场不同而已，人为什么是人，就是因为有诸多缺点但是依然存在良知和善意～
所以就算白白这么久才开新文，人家还是会一如既往滴支持白白的，我多善解人意，某白还不赶紧多更大粗长վ'ᴗ' ի"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1690826916,"group_id":"7261739716398025762","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"女频文里的爱男作者给爷爬","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/4pjWpRdth07P2Fym3XhqkV3GgXSXQiP5Z2kiDDQt2w","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/217c7d054c2240ae816a8175fc9fda37~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776617494&x-signature=XIGf%2BDszdCVM4sl%2BAYQzUqil%2Bro%3D","user_id":"2598891808626424","user_name":"南唐吖"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2598891808626424","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1734952950,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7261739716398025762","book_info":{"abstract":"排雷：屎尿屁很多，吃饭不要看。
